query:
Your agent ID: nan-003-agent-1-architect

Design the architecture for nan-003 (Unimatrix Onboarding Skills: /unimatrix-init and /unimatrix-seed).

Read these artifacts:
- SCOPE.md: product/features/nan-003/SCOPE.md
- Scope Risk Assessment: product/features/nan-003/SCOPE-RISK-ASSESSMENT.md
- Product vision: product/PRODUCT-VISION.md
- Existing skill examples in .claude/skills/ (read several to understand the format)
- Existing agent definitions in .claude/agents/uni/ (understand orientation patterns)

Address SR-XX risks from the scope risk assessment in your architecture decisions where applicable.

Produce:
- architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md at product/features/nan-003/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md
- ADR files in product/features/nan-003/architecture/ for key decisions

Focus on: component structure, skill file design, CLAUDE.md block template, state machine for seed levels, idempotency mechanism, agent scan algorithm, entry quality gates.

Return: ARCHITECTURE.md path, ADR file paths, key decisions, open questions.

entries.title: ADR-004 nan-005: Content Boundary -- README vs CLAUDE.md vs Onboarding Skills
ADR-005 nan-003: CLAUDE.md Block Lists Only unimatrix-* Skills
